revision.comment: This template ensures compliance with WCAG G17. It will reject any background–foreground colour combination with a contrast ratio less than 7:1. {{Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} takes one argument, the background colour.

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{1}}}|black}} >= 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{1}}}|white}} >= 7|background-color: {{{1}}}; color: {{#invoke:Color contrast|greatercontrast|{{{1}}}|black|white}};|/* {{{cat|}}} */}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content=
This template ensures compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17]. It will reject any background–foreground colour combination with a contrast ratio less than 7:1. {{tl|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} takes one argument, the background colour.

Here is {{diff|Template:Infobox television season|prev|672035442|an example of how to use it}}.

== Examples ==
* {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|navy}}
* {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|red}}
* {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|white}}
* {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|black}}
* {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|#005500}}
* {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|#CC5500}}
}}

[[Category:Color conversion templates]]
</noinclude>

{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|black}}}|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|white}}}|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template checks for compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17], i.e. that a background–foreground colour combination has got a contrast ratio of more than 7:1. It takes two arguments, the base colour value, and the tracking category, category, to place non-compliant transclusions in. A third parameter, other, is optional; the template will by default calculate the contrast ratio against black and white, on the assumption that it is used in conjunction with {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}}. == Examples == * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=red|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=#CC5500|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=asdf|category=Test}} }} [[Category:Color conversion templates]]

{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{#if:{{{other|}}}|{{{other}}}|black}}|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{#if:{{{other|}}}|{{{other}}}|white}}|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template checks for compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17], i.e. that a background–foreground colour combination has got a contrast ratio of more than 7:1. It takes two arguments, the base colour value, and the tracking category, category, to place non-compliant transclusions in. A third parameter, other, is optional; the template will by default calculate the contrast ratio against black and white, on the assumption that it is used in conjunction with {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}}. == Examples == * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=red|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=#CC5500|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=asdf|category=Test}} }} [[Category:Color conversion templates]]

{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template checks for compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17], i.e. that a background–foreground colour combination has got a contrast ratio of more than 7:1. It takes two arguments, the base colour value, and the tracking category, category, to place non-compliant transclusions in. A third parameter, other, is optional; the template will by default calculate the contrast ratio against black and white, on the assumption that it is used in conjunction with {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}}. == Examples == * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=red|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=#CC5500|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=asdf|category=Test}} }} [[Category:Color conversion templates]]

{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template checks for compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17], i.e. that a background–foreground colour combination has got a contrast ratio of more than 7:1. It takes two arguments, the base colour value, and the tracking category, category, to place non-compliant transclusions in. A third parameter, other, is optional; the template will by default calculate the contrast ratio against black and white, on the assumption that it is used in conjunction with {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}}. == Examples == * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=red|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=#CC5500|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=asdf|category=Test}} }} ==See also== * {{Tlx|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} [[Category:Color conversion templates]]

{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template checks for compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17], i.e. that a background–foreground colour combination has got a contrast ratio of more than 7:1. It takes two arguments, the base colour value, and the tracking category, category, to place non-compliant transclusions in. A third parameter, other, is optional; the template will by default calculate the contrast ratio against black and white, on the assumption that it is used in conjunction with {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}}. == Examples == * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=red|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=#CC5500|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=asdf|category=Test}} ==See also== * {{Tlx|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} }} [[Category:Color conversion templates]]

{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template checks for compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17], i.e. that a background–foreground colour combination has got a contrast ratio of more than 7:1. It takes two arguments, the base colour value, and the tracking category, category, to place non-compliant transclusions in. A third parameter, other, is optional; the template will by default calculate the contrast ratio against black and white, on the assumption that it is used in conjunction with {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}}. == Examples == * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=red|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=#CC5500|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=asdf|category=Test}} ==See also== * {{Tlx|Ensure AA contrast ratio}} }} [[Category:Color conversion templates]]

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Ensure AAA contrast ratio]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: nearly 15,000 mainspace transclusions ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (ind...
revision.text: {{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template checks for compliance with [http://www.w3.org/TR/2014/NOTE-WCAG20-TECHS-20140916/G17 WCAG G17], i.e. that a background–foreground colour combination has got a contrast ratio of more than 7:1. It takes two arguments, the base colour value, and the tracking category, category, to place non-compliant transclusions in. A third parameter, other, is optional; the template will by default calculate the contrast ratio against black and white, on the assumption that it is used in conjunction with {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}}. == Examples == * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=navy|other=navy|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=red|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=#CC5500|category=Test}} * {{#invoke:DemoTemplate|{{PAGENAME}}|base=asdf|category=Test}} ==See also== * {{Tlx|Ensure AA contrast ratio}} }} [[Category:Color conversion templates]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>The Earwig|wikipedia>The Earwig]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Ensure AAA contrast ratio]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->
#redirect[[en:Template:Ensure AAA contrast ratio]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Removed redirect to [[en:Template:Ensure AAA contrast ratio]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ensure_AAA_contrast_ratio here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#if:{{{base|}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|{{{other|}}}|error=21}} < 7 OR {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|black|error=0}} < 7 AND {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|{{{base}}}|white|error=0}} < 7|{{{category|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
